info.name: MiniMart RBAC Tests
info.description: Test collection for MiniMart role-based authorization. Uses XSRF-TOKEN/X-XSRF-TOKEN for unsafe requests and stores JWT access_token values from Set-Cookie for role-switching tests.

item.name: Create Pending Receipt With Batch Lines - Warehouse (201)

exec: pm.test('Warehouse creates pending receipt with import batch lines', () => {

body.raw:
{
  "receiptCode": "{{import_receipt_code}}",
  "importDate": "2026-07-01T09:30:00",
  "totalAmount": 360000,
  "paidAmount": 200000,
  "debtAmount": 160000,
  "receiptStatus": 1,
  "note": "Postman import product flow - pending receipt",
  "supplierId": {{import_supplier_id}},
  "employeeId": {{warehouse_employee_id}},
  "batchLines": [
    {
      "productId": {{import_product_id_1}},
      "barcode": null,
      "batchCode": "{{import_batch_code_1}}",
      "manufactureDate": "2026-06-20T00:00:00",
      "expiryDate": "2027-06-20T00:00:00",
      "importPrice": 5000,
      "quantity": 30
    },
    {
      "productId": null,
      "barcode": "{{import_product_barcode_2}}",
      "batchCode": "{{import_batch_code_2}}",
      "manufactureDate": "2026-06-18T00:00:00",
      "expiryDate": "2027-06-18T00:00:00",
      "importPrice": 4200,
      "quantity": 50
    }
  ]
}

item.name: Update Pending Receipt Batch Lines - Warehouse (200)

exec: pm.test('Warehouse updates pending receipt before stock import', () => {

body.raw:
{
  "receiptCode": "{{import_receipt_code}}",
  "importDate": "2026-07-01T10:00:00",
  "totalAmount": 410000,
  "paidAmount": 250000,
  "debtAmount": 160000,
  "receiptStatus": 1,
  "note": "Postman import product flow - adjusted before completion",
  "supplierId": {{import_supplier_id}},
  "employeeId": {{warehouse_employee_id}},
  "batchLines": [
    {
      "productId": {{import_product_id_1}},
      "barcode": null,
      "batchCode": "{{import_batch_code_1}}-UPD",
      "manufactureDate": "2026-06-20T00:00:00",
      "expiryDate": "2027-06-20T00:00:00",
      "importPrice": 5000,
      "quantity": 40
    },
    {
      "productId": null,
      "barcode": "{{import_product_barcode_2}}",
      "batchCode": "{{import_batch_code_2}}-UPD",
      "manufactureDate": "2026-06-18T00:00:00",
      "expiryDate": "2027-06-18T00:00:00",
      "importPrice": 4200,
      "quantity": 50
    }
  ]
}
